title: Portfolio: GitHub Profile Cleanup and Project Pinning
content:
### Day 234: Portfolio: GitHub Profile Cleanup and Project Pinning

**GitHub Profile Polish:**
1. Professional profile picture and bio
2. Pin your 3 best projects
3. Each repo: clear README, clean code, requirements.txt
4. Contribution graph should show activity
codeExample:
# Day 234: Portfolio: GitHub Profile Cleanup and Project Pinning
# GitHub Profile Checklist
checklist = [
    "✅ Professional profile photo",
    "✅ Bio: 'ML Engineer | Python | scikit-learn | FastAPI'",
    "✅ Pin 3 best projects",
    "✅ Each project README has: description, setup, results, screenshots",
    "✅ Clean commit history with meaningful messages",
    "✅ requirements.txt in every project",
    "✅ .gitignore (no data files, no __pycache__)",
    "✅ Consistent coding style (PEP 8)",
]

print("GitHub Portfolio Checklist:")
for item in checklist:
    print(f"  {item}")
practiceQuestions: What do hiring managers look at on GitHub?
What makes a good project README?
keyTakeaways:
Each repo: clear README, clean code, requirements.txt
4.
